excerpt: The Meccans took deliberate precautions, stuffing their ears with cotton so that even by accident they might not hear the voice of the Messenger of Allāh
source_location_hint: Life of the Prophet, conversion narratives

excerpt: Yet as Ṭufayl performed the ritual circumambulation, he observed a man of striking beauty standing in prayer, and upon hearing he was called a sorcerer, thought to himself this cannot be the face of a magician
Ṭufayl cried out in rapture at the Prophet's words, saying: 'Repeat! Repeat! With this utterance you have touched the depths of the boundless ocean'
source_location_hint: Conversion narrative of Ṭufayl, Meccan period
